mapper.sql: tpid.plan_implement_id, tpid.dept_id, tpid.enabled_flag, case when exists ( select DISTINCT dept_name from fnd_dept where enabled_flag = 1 and deleted_flag = 0 and dept_name = tpid.dept_name GROUP BY dept_name having count(1) > 1 ) then (select dept_name from fnd_dept where enabled_flag = 1 and deleted_flag = 0 and id = (select temp.parent_id from fnd_dept temp where temp.id = tpid.dept_id ) ) + '.' + tpid.dept_name else tpid.dept_name end as dept_name, tpid.id, tpid.create_time, tpid.create_by, tpid.update_time, tpid.update_by

${tAlias}.plan_implement_id as ${tAlias}_plan_implement_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert:
insert into td_plan_implement_dept (plan_implement_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, dept_name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, 1, fd.dept_name, getdate(), #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, getdate(), #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} from
fnd_dept fd where fd.id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fd.enabled_flag = 1

insert into td_plan_implement_dept (plan_implement_id, dept_id, enabled_flag, dept_name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_plan_implement_dept set plan_implement_id = #{planImplementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
